playArea.value: A source that can stream alpha particles onto a thin foil.  An observation window shows a highly magnified view of the foil.  You can adjust the energy of the alpha particles and the number of protons  and neutrons comprising the atoms in the foil.

controlArea.value: You can choose between atomic and nuclear scale views of the experiment.  There are buttons to pause and step incrementally through observations and a  button to reset the sim.

interactionHint.value: Turn on alpha particle source to begin observations.

playArea.value: A source that can stream alpha particles onto a thin foil.  An observation window shows a highly magnified view of the foil.  You can adjust the energy of the alpha particles.

controlArea.value: There are buttons to pause and step incrementally through observations and a  button to reset the sim.

interactionHint.value: Turn on alpha particle source to begin observations.

atomSpaceDescription.value: An atomic scale view of the foil is shown. Portions of five tightly packed atoms are visible, with three nuclei visible in the scene.

nucleusSpaceDescription.value: A nuclear scale view of the foil is shown. A single nucleus is visible with a representative number of protons and neutrons.

alphaParticlesHelpText.value: Start and stop stream of alpha particles.

energySliderDescription.value: Adjust the energy of particles in the alpha particle stream.

traceCheckboxDescription.value: Observe particles in stream with or without traces.

protonSliderDescription.value: Adjust number of protons per atom in foil.

neutronSliderDescription.value: Adjust number of neutrons per atom in foil.

switchScaleDescription.value: Observe experiments at nuclear or atomic scales.
